html.h4: Filters: NFO hostname - $nfo_hostname$ | Device group - $exp_group$ | Device - $exp_ip$

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20064` | head 1 | addinfo | eval selection_duration=strftime(info_min_time, "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p") . " - " . strftime(info_max_time, "%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p") | table selection_duration

| dedup src_ip dest_ip dest_port transport _time | eventstats latest(dest_host) as dest_host latest(src_host) as src_host by exp_ip dest_ip | `format_ip_column(src_ip,src_ip,src_host)` | `format_ip_column(dest_ip,dest_ip,dest_host)` | strcat src_ip " - " dest_ip host_pair | `per_second_chart(sum(sum_bytes) by host_pair,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| eventstats latest(dest_host) as dest_host latest(src_host) as src_host by exp_ip src_ip dest_ip | eval srv_port = if(isnull(dest_port), "undefined", dest_port) | `format_port_column(server_port, srv_port)` | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(sum_bytes) as sumbytes sum(sum_bytes_in) as sumbytesin sum(sum_bytes_out) as sumbytesout sum(sum_packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(sum_packets_out) as sumpacketsout sum(sum_flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname exp_ip sum_by_exp src_ip server_port dest_ip _time
| eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/$span_int$ | eval avgbits_in= sumbytesin*8/$span_int$ | eval avgbits_out= sumbytesout*8/$span_int$ | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumbytesin) as TrafficAmountIn sum(sumbytesout) as TrafficAmountOut sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic max(avgbits_in) as MaxTrafficIn max(avgbits_out) as MaxTrafficOut by nfo_hostname exp_ip src_ip server_port dest_ip | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 20 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval AverageSpeedIn=(TrafficAmountIn)*8/$range$ | eval AverageSpeedOut=(TrafficAmountOut)*8/$range$ | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficSpeedIn=AverageSpeedIn/1000000 | eval TrafficSpeedOut=AverageSpeedOut/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval TrafficAmountIn=TrafficAmountIn/1024/1024 | eval TrafficAmountOut=TrafficAmountOut/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | eval MaxTrafficIn=MaxTrafficIn/1000000 | eval MaxTrafficOut=MaxTrafficOut/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Avg Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Avg Mbps rcvd, TrafficSpeedIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Avg Mbps sent, TrafficSpeedOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Traffic MB, TrafficAmount, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Traffic MB rcvd, TrafficAmountIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Traffic MB sent, TrafficAmountOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps rcvd, MaxTrafficIn, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps sent, MaxTrafficOut, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Conns, Connections)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name dest_ip server_port src_ip "Max Mbps rcvd" "Avg Mbps rcvd" "Traffic MB rcvd" "Max Mbps sent" "Avg Mbps sent" "Traffic MB sent" "Total Conns" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename dest_ip as "Server" | rename server_port as "Server port" | rename src_ip as "Client"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10064: Top Pairs Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20064). This Module reports top Host Pairs network conversations. In contract to Module 10067 which reports consolidated unidirectional flows, this Module stitches client-server request-response flows, reporting bytes and packets server-to-client and client-to-server in separate fields. This Module is packaged in NFO “Network Traffic and Devices Monitor” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
